title: Inconsistent Parameter resolution in generate block

features.name: parameter-dependent condition inside always_comb in generate block
features.description: Code should include an if statement with a parameter-dependent condition inside an always_comb block that is within a generate block

features.name: unevaluated array slice with always-false parameter condition
features.description: Code should include an array slice operation with parameter-based bounds that would be out of bounds, guarded by a parameter condition that is always false
